# terrible_community_hrobot_reverse_dns (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `ip` (String) The IP address to set or remove a reverse DNS entry for.

### Optional

- `state` (String) Whether to set or update (`present`) or delete (`absent`) the reverse DNS entry for `ip`.
- `value` (String) The reverse DNS entry for `ip`. Required if `state=present`.
